description: A recruitment graphic for an ICE attorney job fair. The right two-thirds shows a golden-lit photographic or illustrated rendering of a bronze Lady Justice (Themis) statue, blindfolded, holding aloft a set of balance scales in her raised right hand; sunlight comes through an arched window behind her. On the left, a translucent, rippling American flag is overlaid, fading into the bright upper-left corner. Bold dark-navy serif text in the upper left reads 'Calling ALL Attorneys' (with 'ALL' enlarged). The lower third is a solid dark teal and navy band containing white serif text: 'Join us at our virtual job fair.' and 'December 11' with smaller text '11 a.m. - 1 p.m. or 5 p.m. - 7 p.m.' At bottom left is the DHS seal beside the 'ICE | Office of the Principal Legal Advisor' logo, and at bottom right 'ICE.gov/careers'.
notable_text: Calling ALL Attorneys; Join us at our virtual job fair. December 11; ICE.gov/careers
